description_long: This hurdle features a sturdy rectangular frame with two wide, angled support legs on either side, providing stability. The main horizontal bar is adorned with a bold black-and-white checkerboard pattern, making it highly visible from a distance. The legs are solid and slightly flared at the base, likely to prevent tipping during use. The structure appears to be made of a durable material, possibly metal or heavy-duty plastic, suitable for repeated impacts. The checkerboard design serves as a visual cue for athletes or participants, ensuring the bar is easily seen in various lighting conditions. There are no visible adjustment mechanisms or additional bars, indicating a fixed-height design.
description: A robust hurdle with a black-and-white checkerboard bar and wide, angled support legs, designed for high visibility and stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full checkerboard bar and both angled support legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the depth of the support leg.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the checkerboard bar and support legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and leg structure.
attribute_bar_arrangement: Single horizontal bar with a checkerboard pattern, supported by two wide, angled vertical legs; no additional bars or adjustable features.
